title: 🎭 Zero Commands
description: Add to your **Custom Prompt** field. Copy with `< >` brackets. Stack multiple for combos.

fields.name: 📚 How to Use
fields.value:
• Copy with `< >` brackets into **Custom Prompt**
• Stack: `<JAILBREAK_CLAUDE> <NSFW> <LONG_RESPONSE>`

fields.name: 🔓 Jailbreaks
fields.value:
`<JAILBREAK>` - Other models
`<JAILBREAK_CLAUDE>` - For Claude
`<JAILBREAK_GEMINI>` - For Gemini
`<ANTI_SLOP>` - Less slop

fields.name: 🔞 Adult
fields.value:
`<NSFW>` - Smut
`<BETTERSPICE>` - Enhanced smut
`<DEAD_DOVE>` - Brutal
`<MPREG>` - Male pregnancy

fields.name: 🎭 Mechanics
fields.value:
`<PERSONA_SYNC>` - Respects your persona
`<VISCERAL_COMBAT>` - Technical fights
`<LIVE_AUDIENCE>` - Fake chat overlay
`<CHOICE_PANEL>` - VN choice menu
`<NO_OMNISCIENCE>` - No mind reading
`<EVOCATIVE_NAMES>` - Unique names

fields.name: ⚙️ Behavior
fields.value:
`<GASLIGHT>` - Gaslighting
`<MANIPULATION>` - Manipulation
`<NPC_PROACTIVE>` - Active NPCs
`<NPC_NEEDS>` - NPC needs
`<CHARACTER_DEPTH>` - Deep characters
`<CANON_ACCURATE>` - Canon accuracy

fields.name: ✍️ Style
fields.value:
`<NOVEL>` - Novel prose
`<LITERARY>` - Sophisticated
`<DETAILED>` - Sensory detail
`<CONCISE>` - Short responses
`<LONG_RESPONSE>` - Long responses
`<STORY_PUSH>` - Plot momentum
`<ANTI_MIRROR>` - No parroting
`<SHOW_NOT_TELL>` - Show don't tell
`<THIRD_PERSON>` - Third person POV

fields.name: 📖 Narrative
fields.value:
`<AUTOPLOT>` - Auto twists
`<DRAMATIC>` - High tension
`<SLOW_BURN>` - Slow romance
`<SLICE_OF_LIFE>` - Cozy moments

fields.name: 🗣️ Dialogue
fields.value:
`<REALISTIC_DIALOGUE>` - Natural dialogue
`<INNER_DIALOGUE>` - Inner thoughts
`<FILLER_WORDS>` - Speech habits
`<MODERN_LINGO>` - Modern slang
`<FORMATTING>` - Format syntax

fields.name: 🛠️ Tools
fields.value:
`<SEARCH>` - Web search
`<REASONING>` - Chain of thought
`<HIDE_THINKING>` - Hide reasoning
